reviews.comment:
Siempre con organizacion y buena predisposicion. Hago la renovacio del registro de conducir y en el dia lo retiro. Es barbaro que no perdes tiempo. Seguire yendo por los tramites que pueda hacer alli.

(Translated by Google)
Always organized and helpful. I renewed my driver's license and picked it up the same day. It's great that you don't waste any time. I'll keep going there for any other paperwork I can do.
